verify.cooldown: One sec - wait a moment, then tap **Verify** again.
verify.instructions: Type the characters shown below (not case-sensitive). New image each try.
verify.expired: That code expired - tap **Verify** for a fresh one.
verify.roleMissing: Passed - but the verified role is missing. Ping a mod.
verify.tooMany: Too many wrong tries - tap **Verify** for a new image.
verify.wrong: That's not right - tap **Verify** for a new image and try again. ({left} left)
verify.panelText:
**Verify & Agree to the Rules**
Click **Verify** and type the code from the image. Verifying confirms you’ve read and agree to the rules above, and unlocks the server.

appeal.invalid: That appeal link is no longer valid - you may already have been unbanned, or already sent an appeal for this ban.
appeal.busy: The mod team's inbox is busy right now - please try again in a minute.
appeal.sent: ✅ Your appeal was sent to **{guild}**'s mod team. If they approve it, I'll DM you a fresh invite.
appeal.unreachable: Sorry - I couldn't reach that server's mod team ({error}). Try again in a moment.
appeal.dmIntro: ⚠️ You were banned by a **MadHoney** honeypot - a hidden channel that exists only to catch spam bots. Anything posted there is banned automatically.
appeal.dmAsk: If you're a real person who ended up in one by mistake, you can ask **{guild}**'s mod team to take another look:
appeal.approvedInvite: ✅ Your appeal to **{guild}** was approved. Rejoin here: {invite}
appeal.approvedNoInvite: ✅ Your appeal to **{guild}** was approved. Ask a member for a fresh invite to rejoin.
appeal.denied: Your appeal to **{guild}** was reviewed and not approved.

reply.needManageServer: You need **Manage Server** to use MadHoney controls.
reply.noHoneypotYet: No honeypot channel set yet - run `/madhoney setup` first.
reply.banshareOn: 🌐 **Ban sharing ON** - users on the universal MadHoney ban list (caught by any server's honeypot) are auto-banned when they join here. Run `/madhoney bansync` to also ban everyone already on the list.
reply.banshareOff: 🔒 **Isolated** - this server acts only on its own honeypot catches. (Your catches still feed the universal list for servers that opt in.)
reply.modeArmed: 🍯 **Honeypot armed.** Accounts that post in the honeypot are banned immediately.
reply.modeReview: ⏸ **Honeypot set to hold for review.** Honeypot posts are reported to your log channel with Ban / Dismiss buttons instead of an instant ban - a mod decides. Not recommended for busy servers, and it needs a log channel set.
reply.modeDisarmed: ⭘ **Honeypot disarmed.** The trap is off - nobody gets banned until you arm it again.
reply.modeReviewNoLog: ⚠️ You have no log channel set, so held posts have nowhere to go. Set one under **Staff & log**.

log.reportBanned: 🍯 **The following message was posted in the honeypot** (<#{channel}>) **and the user has been banned.**
log.reportFailed: 🍯 **The following message was posted in the honeypot** (<#{channel}>) **and the user has been ⚠️ NOT banned (ban failed - check my permissions).**
log.reviewHeld: ⏸ **Held for review.** {tag} (`{id}`) posted in the honeypot (<#{channel}>). **Nobody has been banned yet.**
log.banshareReport: 🌐 **Auto-banned on join** - this user is on the universal MadHoney ban list (caught by another server's honeypot).
log.webhookAlert: 🪝 **A webhook posted in the honeypot** (<#{channel}>) and its message was deleted. Webhooks aren't members, so they can't be banned - open **Server Settings → Integrations → Webhooks** and delete any you don't recognize.
log.appealForward: 📩 **Ban appeal** - <@{id}> ({tag}, `{id}`) was banned by the honeypot and is asking you to take another look.
log.unbannedBy: ✅ **Unbanned** by {mod} - they can rejoin (send them a fresh invite; ban-share won't re-ban them).

setup.title: ## MadHoney setup
setup.dashHint: 💡 **The web dashboard is the easy way to do this.** {dash} is far more powerful and user-friendly than these chat commands - drag-and-drop channel gating, a live banner designer, appeals, and clearer guidance. These commands work too, if you prefer Discord.
setup.verifiedRole: **Verified role:** {role} - pick an existing role, or create one first (Server Settings → Roles, e.g. "Verified").
setup.verifyChannel: **Verify channel:** {channel} - where the Verify button lives. Your **#rules** channel is the classic spot.
setup.honeypotChannel: **Honeypot channel:** {channel} - create a decoy channel bots will post in. Name it like a real channel: `general-2`, `general2`, `chat-2`. Anyone who posts there is banned.
setup.staffRole: **Staff role (optional):** {role} - members with it are never trapped (admins with **Manage Server** and the owner are always exempt). Set it under **Staff & log**.
setup.logChannel: **Log channel (optional):** {channel} - every honeypot ban is reported there with an **Unban** button. Set it under **Staff & log**.
setup.hpReview: ⏸ **Hold for review** - a mod approves each hit
setup.onboarding: ⚠️ If you use Discord **Onboarding**, make sure it does NOT auto-grant the verified role, or the captcha is bypassable.
setup.accessibility: ♿ Honeypots are visual traps - not recommended for servers serving visually impaired communities. At minimum, name the honeypot in your rules so text-to-speech users hear the warning.
setup.whenReady: When all three are set, run **/madhoney deploy**.
setup.clash: ❌ Verify and honeypot must be **different** channels.

more.title: ## Staff & log
more.staffRole: **Staff role:** {role} - anyone with this role can post in the honeypot without being banned. The owner and anyone with **Manage Server** are always exempt; set this for mods who don't have that permission.
more.logChannel: **Log channel:** {channel} - a staff-only channel; every honeypot ban is reported there with an **Unban** button in case someone trips it by accident.

deploy.title: ## Deploy MadHoney
deploy.dashHint: 💡 Prefer buttons and a live preview? Do all of this on the dashboard: {dash}
deploy.step1: 1. **Grandfather members** - give everyone already here the verified role
deploy.step2: 2. **Post Verify panel** - the button + captcha, in your verify channel
deploy.step3: 3. **Post honeypot banner** - the warning image (design it with `/madhoney banner`)

banner.preview: Banner preview - saved. Tweak with `/madhoney banner`, or post it:
